payload.description: Exemplars in the topic memory display need clickable links to the original Items. The TopicList/TopicItem components in dashboard/components/ui/topic-list.tsx already render IdentifierDisplay when item_id or identifiers are present on an exemplar. The backend needs to include this data. In plexus/reports/blocks/feedback_analysis.py _run_memory_analysis, when selecting exemplars for each cluster, look up the corresponding item's identifiers (external_id and any structured identifiers) and include them in the exemplar object as item_id and identifiers fields so IdentifierDisplay can render links.
payload.title: Show IdentifierDisplay links next to exemplars in TopicList
